vocab.server: Bun.serve({ fetch(req) { return new Response(...) } }). Or Elysia framework for typed routing with .get/.post.
vocab.database: bun:sqlite built-in. import { Database } from 'bun:sqlite'. Drizzle ORM with drizzle-orm/bun-sqlite driver.
vocab.api: Elysia: new Elysia().get('/path', handler).post('/path', handler). t.Body() schema for validation.
vocab.testing: bun test built-in. describe/test/expect API compatible with Jest. bun test --watch for TDD.
vocab.performance: Bun bundles and transpiles TypeScript natively. No tsc step needed. SQLite runs in-process for zero network latency.
